package.name: auv_navigation
package.description: AUV kinematic navigation (EKF): packages/sbg_ros2_driver Imu (imu/data), arduino_ps Float32 depth m (/auv/depth), packages/dvl-a50 (dvl_msgs/DVL on /dvl/data, optional DVLDR on /dvl/position). Optional sensor_msgs/Range bottom altimeter (e.g. Ping on /ping1d/range) with constant seabed_z_ned in vessel YAML. No custom actuator messages; optional thruster feedback via sensor_msgs/JointState. Package source: code_ws/src/auv_navigation/. Colcon workspace must include dvl_msgs (e.g. packages/dvl_msgs).
